title: Fabulous weather on Friday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest weather forecast from the South African Weather Service (SAWS), the Garden Route and Karoo are in for a mild day weather wise, on Friday.

Fine and cool to warm conditions are expected over the weekend.


> Regional forecast for Friday:


Western Cape

Morning fog over the southern and south-western parts, otherwise fine and cool to warm. The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh easterly to south-easterly along the south west coast. The expected UVB sunburn index: Low

Western half of the Eastern Cape

Morning fog in the south, otherwise fine and cool. The wind along the coast will be light to moderate north-

westerly, becoming north-easterly in the afternoon.

Eastern half of the Eastern Cape

Morning fog in the north, otherwise fine and cold to cool. The wind along the coast will be light north-westerly in the morning, otherwise south-easterly, becoming north-easterly from the evening.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
